chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4103 / 2016 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Priority 1.For hearing of misc.No.20250/2016 2.For hearing of main case. 06-10-2016 None present for the Petitioner Shaikh Liaquat Hussain, Standing Counsel. Mr.Kafeel Ahmed, Assistant Director, Textile Commissioners Organization, Ministry of Textile Industry present in person. --- For last two dates the petitioner is called absent, who is appearing in person. On 7.9.2016 Mr.Abdul Rauf Siddiqui, Textile Commissioner, representative of respondent Nos.1 to 4 produced copy of letter dated 4.8.2016 and submitted that the petitioner had received Rs.1,75,555/- and at present nothing is outstanding against her. Today, Mr.Kafeel Ahmed, Assistant Director, Textile Commissioners Organization, Ministry of Textile Industry is present and he endorsed the above statement that a sum of Rs.1,75,555/- has been paid to the petitioner. Since the petitioner is appearing in person, we issued direct notice to her but neither she is present nor any intimation has been received, which shows that she has lost interest in this case. Petition is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge ns
